downloadCrx.title: Download CRX via Extension ID
downloadCrx.placeholder: Enter Chrome Web Store extension ID
downloadCrx.proxyHint: Downloading requires access to Chrome Web Store; optionally select a configured proxy for downloading, checking updates, and updating plugins.

updateCheckToast.unknown: No plugin update information was returned
updateCheckToast.upToDate: Plugin is already up to date

updatePackageToast.stillUpdateAvailable: Plugin downloaded, but a newer version is still detected: {{latestVersion}}
updatePackageToast.statusCheckFailed: Plugin downloaded, but update status check failed

install.title: Start Installation
install.desc: Filter target profiles first, then multi-select profiles to install plugins. Running profiles will have config written first and take effect after restart.
install.emptyFilter: No installable profiles match current filter.

toast.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one profile
toast.restartNotice: Running profiles need restart for plugin changes to take effect
toast.readProxyPrefFailed: Failed to read plugin download proxy preference
toast.saveProxyPrefFailed: Failed to save plugin download proxy preference
